passives.name: True Sight
passives.effects: Turrets can see and will {{tip|true sight|reveal}} {{tip|camouflage|camouflaged}} and {{tip|invisible}} units within 1100 units.

effects_structured.raw: Turrets reveal camouflaged and invisible units within 1100 units.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Turret True Sight reveals stealth units and traps within 1100 range; line-of-sight can still be obstructed by terrain per turret gameplay notes.
